parameters.name: tz_name

schema.description: IANA timezone name (e.g. 'Europe/Stockholm'). Preferred over tz_offset_mins; handles DST correctly.
schema.title: Tz Name

parameters.description: IANA timezone name (e.g. 'Europe/Stockholm'). Preferred over tz_offset_mins; handles DST correctly.

parameters.name: tz_offset_mins

schema.description: Fallback UTC offset in minutes when tz_name is not provided (e.g. 120 for UTC+2). Does not handle DST.
schema.title: Tz Offset Mins

parameters.description: Fallback UTC offset in minutes when tz_name is not provided (e.g. 120 for UTC+2). Does not handle DST.

post.description:
Import transactions from a bank export (CSV or XLSX).

Duplicate transactions (by dedup hash) are automatically skipped.

parameters.name: bank_account_id

schema.description: Bank account to attach transactions to.
schema.title: Bank Account Id

parameters.description: Bank account to attach transactions to.

patch.description: Update category for a list of transactions by ID.

post.description: Set category for all transactions matching the given description.

get.description: Aggregate debit spending per category for a given month.
Return income and expenses aggregated per month.

parameters.name: months

schema.description: Number of months to look back (including current).
schema.title: Months

parameters.description: Number of months to look back (including current).

get.description: Fetch Klarna transactions and return raw GraphQL response.

schema.title: Response Get Klarna Transactions V1 Klarna Transactions Get

post.description:
Fetch Klarna transactions and import them into Metron.
Skips rejected (isAmountLineThrough), pending, and duplicate transactions.

active_secs.title: Active Secs
active_secs.description: Total active seconds attributed to this app.

active_secs.description: Total active seconds for the day.

days.title: Days
days.description: Per-day totals, sorted ascending by date. Days with no activity are omitted.

local_id.description: Original SQLite id from the source machine.

ts.title: Ts
ts.description: Unix epoch seconds (UTC) when the event was recorded.

bucket.title: Bucket
bucket.description: Bucket index from midnight (0-based). Each bucket spans bucket_mins minutes.

active_secs.description: Total active seconds in this bucket.

bucket_mins.title: Bucket Mins
bucket_mins.description: Duration of each bucket in minutes.

total_buckets.title: Total Buckets
total_buckets.description: Total number of buckets covering the requested window.

buckets.title: Buckets
buckets.description: Buckets with activity, sorted ascending. Buckets with no activity are omitted.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: All known machine sources, ordered by most recent activity.

total_active_secs.title: Total Active Secs
total_active_secs.description: Total active seconds in the requested time window.
